title: Plasmar's survival modpack with masady's mods and other stuff
description: fabulously optimized with masady's mods and other stuff
body:
fabulously optimized with masa's mods and other stuff


To open tweakeroo config press X+C, for litematica menu press M, for MiniHUD config press H+C and for Item Scroller press I+C

Came back for 1.21.5 and remade the entire modpack

Currently only forked Nvidium version is out, i will release vulkanmod version when it comes out for 1.21.5
